resources.string: Chatforia inobatsira vanhu kubatana nemitauro, zvishandiso, uye miganhu.
Sarudza kuti mameseji anoonekwa sei, kuti anonyangarika riini, uye kuti account yako inoramba yakachengetedzwa sei.

Chatforia inhume yakachengeteka, ine mitauro yakawanda ine encryption kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, kushandura ipapo ipapo, uye kufona nenzwi/vhidhiyo. Basa redu rakareruka: kubatsira vanhu kubatana—zvakachengeteka, pachivande, uye mumitauro yakasiyana-siyana.
Mashoko anovharwa pamudziyo wako asati abuda. Kushandura, kuchengetedza makopi, uye kuwiriranisa zvishandiso zvakagadzirirwa kuderedza zvinoonekwa nemaseva edu.
Kudzivirira ruzivo kubva pakutanga kusvika pakupedzisira uye kuchengetedza ruzivo rwepachivande zvakavakirwa muChatforia.
Kuwanikwa kwese: Shandura otomatiki mitauro inodarika zana.
Kuwanikwa kwevose: Shandura otomatiki mitauro inodarika zana.
Kudzora: Kunyangarika kwemashoko uye kuverenga marisiti hazvidiwi.
Kuchengetedzwa kwekuchengetedzwa kwepachivande: Kuvharidzira kweE2E kwagara kuripo.
Sarudzo dzekuita kuti Chatforia ive nyore kushandisa pasina kuvimba neruzha.

Tora nhamba yefoni yakachengeteka yemahara yekufonera uye kutumira mameseji pasi rese uchishandisa Wi-Fi kana data. Nakidzwa ne encryption kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, mameseji ari kunyangarika, uye HD voice/video calling — nematurusi akavakirwa mukati anokubatsira kuti urambe wakabatana nemiganhu.

Kugara wakachengeteka paindaneti hakudi ruzivo rwepamusoro rwehunyanzvi—kungoziva, kungwarira, uye kufunga zvakanaka. Netsika dzakakodzera, unogona kutaurirana uine chivimbo uye wakachengeteka.

Kutaurirana paindaneti kwakaita kuti zvive nyore kupfuura kare kusangana nevanhu pasi rese. Ungave uchitumirana mameseji neshamwari, kusangana nevanhu vatsva, kana kushanda pamwe chete nebasa, mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji ane basa guru muhupenyu hwezuva nezuva. Zvisinei, kugara wakachengeteka paindaneti kwakakosha sekugara wakabatana.

Imwe yemitemo inonyanya kukosha yekuchengetedza pamhepo ndeyekudzivisa kugovera ruzivo rwemunhu rwakavanzika. Izvi zvinosanganisira kero yako yekumba, ruzivo rwemari, mapassword, kana chero ruzivo rwekuzvizivisa runogona kushandiswa zvisirizvo. Kunyangwe muhurukuro dzisina kurongeka, zvakanaka kuti uzive zvaunogovana uye kuti ndiani waunogovana naye.

Kutaurirana zvine ruremekedzo kunobatsira kugadzira nzvimbo yakachengeteka kune wese munhu. Dzivisa kutaurirana kunokuvadza kana kutuka, uye cherechedza kuti mashoko ako angakanganisa sei vamwe. Kutaurirana kwakanaka kunobatsira kuti vashandisi vese vave neruzivo rwakanaka.

Mapuratifomu emazuva ano ekutumira mameseji seChatforia anopa maturusi ekubatsira vashandisi kuti vagare vakachengeteka. Zvinhu zvakaita sekuvharira, kushuma, uye kudzora zvakavanzika zvakagadzirirwa kupa vashandisi simba pamusoro pezvavanosangana nazvo. Kana mumwe munhu akaita zvisina kunaka kana kuti akakugumbura, unofanira kushandisa maturusi aya nekukasika.

Vanyengeri vanowanzo shandisa mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji kunyengedza vashandisi kuti vagovane ruzivo rwavo kana kutumira mari. Chenjerera mameseji anoita seakanyanya kunaka kuti ave echokwadi, akadai sezvipo zvisingatarisirwi, zvikumbiro zvekukurumidzira, kana ma link asina kujairika. Gara uchiongorora kuti munhu wauri kutaura naye ndiani usati waita chero chiito.

Sezvo kutaurirana kwedhijitari kuri kuramba kuchikura, kuchengetedza kuchengetedzeka nekuvimbana kunowedzera kukosha. Nekutevera tsika dzekuchengetedza uye kushandisa maturusi aripo, vashandisi vanogona kunakidzwa nemabhenefiti ekutumira mameseji uku vachideredza njodzi.

Chimwe chezvishanduko zvikuru mukutaurirana ikudzikiswa kwezvipingamupinyi zvenzvimbo. Vanhu vava kukwanisa kubatana nevamwe pasi rese munguva pfupi iri kutevera. Ingava yekukurukurirana kwevanhu, bhizinesi, kana kushanda pamwe chete, mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji akaita kuti daro rive shoma.

Remangwana rekutaurirana pasi rose ringangosanganisira maturusi epamusoro-soro, akadai sekutumira mameseji anobatsirwa neAI, shanduro yakavandudzwa, uye ruzivo rwakawedzerwa rwevashandisi. Sezvo tekinoroji ichifambira mberi, kutaurirana kucharamba kuri nyore kunzwisisa uye kuri nyore kuwana.

Kutaurirana kwave kuchichinja nekukurumidza mumakumi emakore apfuura. Zvaimboda kufona kana misangano yekuonana zvino zvinogona kuitwa nekukurumidza kuburikidza nemapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji. Sezvo tekinoroji iri kuramba ichifambira mberi, kutaurirana kwepasi rose kuri kukurumidza, kusvikika, uye kubatanidzwa.
Mapuratifomu akaita seChatforia chikamu chekuchinja uku, zvichibatsira vanhu kubatana zviri nyore nepakati pemitauro nemiganhu.

Sezvo kutaurirana kuri kuwedzera pakuva nedhijitari, kuvanzika nekuchengetedzwa kuri kuwedzera kukosha. Vashandisi vanoda chivimbo chekuti hurukuro dzavo dzakachengetedzwa. Zvinhu zvakaita sekuvharidzira uye marongero anodzorwa nemushandisi zvinobatsira kutsigira ruzivo rwekutaurirana rwakachengeteka.

Kumhanya ndicho chinhu chikuru chinoumba kutaurirana kwemazuva ano. Vashandisi vanotarisira kuti mameseji apihwe nekukurumidza, uye zvivakwa zvemazuva ano zvinotsigira tarisiro iyoyo. Kutumira mameseji panguva chaiyo kunogonesa kukurukurirana kwakajairika uye kwakapfava.

Mutauro wagara uri chimwe chezvipingamupinyi zvikuru pakutaurirana pasi rose. Nhasi, maturusi ekushandura akavakirwa mukati anobatsira kuvhara musiyano iwoyo. Mapuratifomu akaita seChatforia anobvumira vashandisi kutaurirana zviri nyore kunyangwe vachitaura mitauro yakasiyana, zvichigadzira mikana mitsva yekubatana nekunzwisisana.
Ongorora ruzivo pamusoro pekutaurirana, kuchengetedzeka paindaneti, uye kuti tekinoroji yekutumira mameseji iri kubatanidza sei vanhu pasi rese.

Vanhu vanovimba nemapurogiramu ekutumira mameseji ezuva nezuva neshamwari, mhuri, uye vashandi pamwe chete. Ingava nhaurirano pfupi kana hurukuro refu, kutumira mameseji kunopa nzira iri nyore uye inochinjika yekutaura nevanhu.

Kutumirana mameseji kuri kuramba kuchichinja nemabasa matsva akadai semhinduro dzinoshandisa AI, kushandura, uye kugovera multimedia. Sezvo tekinoroji ichifambira mberi, mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji achawedzera kuva nesimba uye anochinjika.

Mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji anobatanidza vanhu pasi rose. Nekushandisa internet, vashandisi vanogona kutaurirana zvisinei nenzvimbo, zvichiita kuti zvive nyore kuvaka hukama nekushandira pamwe pasi rese.

Mapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji ave chimwe chezvishandiso zvakakosha pakutaurirana munyika yanhasi. Kubva pakukurukurirana kwevanhu kusvika pakutaurirana kwebhizinesi, maapplication ekutumira mameseji anobvumira vanhu kuramba vakabatana ipapo ipapo uye zvinobudirira.
Chatforia yakavakwa nepfungwa idzi, ichipa ruzivo rwekutumira mameseji nekukurumidza, kwakachengeteka, uye kuri nyore kushandisa kune nyika yakabatana.

Mapuratifomu emazuva ano ekutumira mameseji anotarisa pakupa vashandisi simba pamusoro pedata ravo nehurukuro dzavo. Zvinhu zvakaita se encryption, kuchengetedzwa kwekuchengetedzwa kwemashoko, uye kudzora mameseji zvinobvumira vashandisi kutaurirana nechivimbo.

Chimwe chezvakanakira zvikuru zvemapuratifomu ekutumira mameseji kumhanya kwawo. Mashoko anotumirwa ipapo ipapo, zvichibvumira vashandisi kutaurirana panguva chaiyo. Kureruka uku kwakaita kuti kutumira mameseji kuve nzira inofarirwa nevanhu vazhinji yekutaurirana.
Nei Mapuratifomu Ekutumira Meseji Achikosha Kupfuura Kare
Mafoni ako achangopinda nekubuda munguva pfupi yapfuura.
Kufona nevhidhiyo kunowanikwa chete kune vanoshandisa app izvozvi.
Maitiro ekunyorera: Shandisa bhatani riri pazasi kutumira email yako ne link.

Tiri timu diki yekutanga iri kuvaka Chatforia — kambani yekutumira mameseji yepasi rose yakazvimirira pawebhu, iOS, neAndroid. Kana muchida ruzivo rwekuchengetedza zvakavanzika, ruzivo rwekuvharira, uye ruzivo runonakidza rwevashandisi, tinoda kunzwa kubva kwamuri.

Mabasa evakatanga mapurogiramu: Mutungamiriri weFull-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).

• Batsirai kuvaka hwaro hwemutumwa mutsva wepasi rose.
• Kuvandudzwa kwekutumira kunoshandiswa pawebhu, iOS, neAndroid.
• Shanda zvakananga nemuvambi pakugadzira uye kutungamira kwechigadzirwa.
• Iva nenzvimbo dzine simba guru mu stack: kutumira mameseji, izwi, vhidhiyo, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Joinha pakutanga — mushandisi asati asvika padanho repamusoro.

Basa rinoitwa \"sezvariri\" pasina vimbiso. Kusvika pamwero wakazara unobvumirwa nemutemo, Chatforia haina mhosva yekukuvadzwa kusina kunanga kana kwakakonzerwa nako.
Nekushandisa Chatforia unobvumirana neMitemo iyi. Kana usingabvumirani, usashandise sevhisi iyi.

Kana ukapa nhamba yefoni, unobvuma kuti Chatforia inogona kukutumira mameseji eSMS ane chekuita neakaundi yako uye mashandisirwo ebasa racho, akadai sezviziviso zvekupinda, zviziviso zvekuchengetedza, uye mameseji ane chekuita nehurukuro dzaunotanga kana kutora chikamu mazviri. Hatishandisi SMS kumashoko ekushambadzira kana ekushambadzira pasina mvumo yako yakajeka. Mitengo yemeseji nedata inogona kushanda. Unogona kusarudza kusagamuchira mameseji eSMS chero nguva nekupindura neshoko rekuti \"opt-out\" rinotsigirwa (semuenzaniso, \"STOP\") kana nekuvandudza marongero ako ezviziviso muapp.
Munochengetedza kodzero dzezviri mukati menyu. Munotipa kodzero dzinodiwa kuti tishandise sevhisi iyi (semuenzaniso, kuendesa zvinhu kunzira, kuchengetedza, kushandura).
Plus inobvisa kushambadza uye inowedzera kutumira. Premium inovhura mamwe madingindira, manzwi emeseji, manzwi ekuridza, maturusi eAI, uye ruzivo rwakazara rweChatforia.

Kunyoresa kunogona kuvandudzwa otomatiki. Kubhadhara kunobhadhariswa kuApple Account yako kana wasimbisa kutenga. Bvisa zvinokanganisa uye vhura zvishandiso zvekutaurirana zvinoshanda.
Vhura maitiro ekugadzirisa, maturusi eAI, uye maficha epamusoro eChatforia.
Ichiri kuenderana. Ndapota edza zvakare munguva pfupi iri kutevera.
Sarudza hurongwa hweapp, wedzera mapaketi edata rako, kana kugovera data nemhuri yako — zvese kubva panzvimbo imwe chete.
Tanga nehurongwa hwedu hwemahara, hunotsigira zviziviso. Shandisa Plus pasina zviziviso, kana kuti vhura maficha ane simba rakawanda nePremium.
Gadzira dziva reruzivo rwemhuri yako uye tonga mashandisirwo emunhu wese kubva panzvimbo imwe chete.
Wedzera data re eSIM repasi rose kuitira kuti Chatforia irambe ichishanda kunyangwe uri kure neWi-Fi.

Tumira mameseji manhamba efoni chaiwo — kwete vamwe vashandisi vemaapplication chete — uine AI uye chinzvimbo chakavakirwa mukati. Zvakanaka kana uchibva kumaapplication akaita seTextFree kana TextMe.
Kushambadza kwakareruka paFree, kuvandudza kuri nyore kwePlus kana wagadzirira, uye maturusi ePremium TextNow haapiwi.
Mapurogiramu emazuva ano, dhizaini yepasi rose, uye shanduro yakavakirwa mukati panzvimbo pekutumira mafoni ekare.
Kuenzanisa kwakavakirwa paruzivo rwunowanikwa pachena uye kunogona kuchinja nekufamba kwenguva. Mamwe maapplication ekutumira mameseji emahara akadai seTextFree kana TextMe anowanzo fanana neTextNow.
Chatforia inokupa nhamba yefoni chaiyo, shanduro yakangwara, uye nzira yakajeka yekushanda pasina kushambadza kana wagadzirira.
Sarudza Plus kana Premium kuti uwane mamwe maficha.
Tanga kufona kwevhidhiyo kwe1:1 nemumwe mushandisi.
Zano: Namira nhamba wofona usingachengetedze munhu waunosangana naye. Tichakoka vanhu vasiri vashandisi nelink.
Vhidhiyo yemapati akawanda uchishandisa zita rekamuri rinogovaniswa.
Gadzira imba kana kuti batana neyagara iripo nekunyora zita rimwe chete.

ESIM yako yagadzirira. Unogona kuvhura QR code kana kuramba uchitarisira hurongwa hwako hwefoni.
Isa eSIM yako kuti ushandise data reChatforia Mobile pachishandiso ichi.
Data rako rapera. Tenga paki itsva kuti urambe uchishandisa data renharembozha.

Unogona kuwana nhamba itsva yeChatforia, kana kuunza nhamba yako yauri kushandisa kubva kune imwe kambani.
Chirongwa ichi chikamu chedura remhuri rinogovaniswa.
Sarudza paki yedata kuti ushandise Chatforia Mobile.
Gadzirisa eSIM yako kutanga, wozosarudza data pack kana wagadzirira.
Tamisa nhamba yako yefoni yauri kushandisa kubva kukambani yako yauri kushandisa kuenda kuChathoria. Ita shuwa kuti ruzivo rwacho rwakafanana neakaundi yako yekambani kuti usanonoka.
Tarisa ma eSIM data packs uye gadzirisa maficha asina waya.
